title: Speaking - Part 3
description: Discuss the options shown with your partner for about two minutes, then decide together which two would be most effective.

content.task: Discuss the following ways of making the fashion industry more ethical and sustainable, then decide which two would have the greatest impact.
options: Introducing government regulations on fast fashion production
Educating consumers about the environmental cost of clothing
Encouraging clothing rental and sharing schemes
Making sustainable brands more affordable and accessible
Implementing stricter standards for fair labour practices

script.text: Now, I'd like you to talk about something together for about two minutes. Here are some ideas related to fashion industry and consumerism. Discuss the following ways of making the fashion industry more ethical and sustainable, then decide which two would have the greatest impact. You have about two minutes for this, so don't worry if I stop you. Please speak so that we can hear you.
Now decide which two would have the greatest impact..
